## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of your changes. Link to any related issues using `#issue-number`.

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Translation addition/improvement
- [ ] Code style/refactor (no functional changes)

## Changes Made
List the specific changes you made:
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
Describe how you tested your changes:
- [ ] Tested in desktop browser (Chrome/Firefox/Safari)
- [ ] Tested in mobile browser
- [ ] Tested in offline mode (PWA)
- [ ] Tested with different currencies
- [ ] Tested with different languages
- [ ] Tested with various asset values
- [ ] Tested accessibility (keyboard navigation, screen reader if applicable)

## Browser Compatibility
- [ ] Chrome/Edge
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Safari
- [ ] Mobile browsers (iOS Safari, Chrome Mobile)

## Screenshots (if applicable)
If this PR includes UI changes, include before/after screenshots.

## Performance Impact
Does this change impact app performance? (e.g., bundle size, calculation speed, network requests)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guide
- [ ] I have added JSDoc comments for new functions
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] I have tested the changes thoroughly
- [ ] No new console warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] This change works in Privacy Mode ON and OFF

## Notes for Reviewers
Add any additional context or notes that would help with the code review.

---

**Thank you for contributing to the Zakah Calculator!** Your work helps serve the Ummah. Please allow time for review and feedback.
